summary: Tested Distributor Billing Approach feature - all 8 backend API tests passed, frontend UI verified. billing_approach field is read/writable via API, defaults to 'margin_upfront' for new distributors. Profile tab shows billing approach display with data-testid='billing-approach-display', edit mode has dropdown with data-testid='edit-billing-approach-select'. Commercial tab shows banner with data-testid='billing-approach-banner' that changes color (emerald for margin_upfront, amber for cost_based).
seed_data_creation: Used existing test distributor 'Surya 1'. billing_approach reverted to 'margin_upfront' after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Distributor Billing Approach feature fully implemented and working. Backend: billing_approach field in DistributorCreate, DistributorUpdate, Distributor models (line 49, 73, 99 in /app/backend/models/distributor.py). Routes: create_distributor stores billing_approach (line 252), update includes it in field list (line 337 in /app/backend/routes/distributors.py). Frontend: OverviewTab.jsx shows billing approach display (data-testid='billing-approach-display') in Commercial Terms section and dropdown in edit mode (data-testid='edit-billing-approach-select'). MarginsTab.jsx shows billing approach banner at top (data-testid='billing-approach-banner') with emerald styling for margin_upfront and amber styling for cost_based. Valid values: 'margin_upfront' (default), 'cost_based'.

Banner shows amber (yellow) styling for cost_based - PASSED

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/distributors: List includes billing_approach in each distributor

margin_upfront.description: Transfer price = Cost card price minus distributor margin. Differences settled via reconciliation.

cost_based.description: Billed at cost card price. Margin calculated post-sale based on actual selling price.
